composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
Bitcoin trades below its 200-day moving average in a confirmed downtrend, establishing the BEAR cycle phase with high confidence. The composite signal is NO_ACTION: this is a bear market operating within normal parameters. No dislocations between derivatives sentiment and fundamental structure warrant tactical positioning. Fear and Greed at 11 reflects expected pessimism during a macro decline.

Altcoin underperformance against Bitcoin (ETH/BTC and SOL/BTC both negative z-scores near -1) confirms risk-off positioning without panic acceleration. Funding rate data unavailable limits precision on leverage extremes, but observable price action—modest 5-day drawdowns across major assets—shows orderly deleveraging rather than cascading liquidation. Stablecoin dominance at 11% suggests measured capital preservation rather than flight-to-safety panic.
